# Render request (prompt timesheet-v1) Module: timesheet-web Stack: python-lib ## Definitions - App factory: `create_web_app(store_path)` returning a FastAPI application bound to one store file. - Entries page: the HTML document served at `GET /` listing entries and hosting the filter toolbar and the add form. - Entry row: a `` carrying `data-testid="entry-row"` that shows one entry's id, project, date, hours, status badge, and actions. - Filter form: the GET `
` carrying `data-testid="filter-form"` and the class `ts-toolbar`, laying its `week` and `project` text inputs and its submit button out in one row. - Add form: the `` carrying `data-testid="add-form"` inside a `ts-card` that posts fields `project`, `date`, and `hours` to `POST /entries`. - Error page: an HTML response rendered through the ui-kit page shell whose body contains a `ts-error` element naming the problem. - Style lock: every HTML response is built with the ui-kit `page` shell, contains no `style=` attribute, and every `class` attribute names only `ts-`-prefixed kit classes. ## Implementation requirements - Use Python 3.12. - Expose `create_web_app(store_path)` from `src/timesheet_web/`. - Declare `fastapi`, `httpx`, and `python-multipart` in the generated `pyproject.toml` `[project]` dependencies. - Persist entries only through the required timestore module and enforce every rule only through the required rules module; the app holds no state of its own. - Build every HTML response — the entries page and every error page — by passing body markup to the required ui-kit module's `page` with the title `Timesheet`; never emit a `
response:
```json {"summary": "FR1: entries page rendering with style-lock-compliant markup, escaping, empty state, and total", "files": [{"path": "pyproject.toml", "action": "write", "root": "module", "contents": "[project] name = "timesheet-web" version = "0.1.0" description = "Timesheet web application" requires-python = ">=3.12" dependencies = [ "fastapi", "httpx", "python-multipart", ] [project.optional-dependencies] test = ["pytest"] [build-system] requires = ["setuptools>=68", "wheel"] build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta" [tool.setuptools.packages.find] where = ["src"] "}, {"path": "src/timesheet_web/__init__.py", "action": "write", "root": "module", "contents": """"Timesheet web application.""" from __future__ import annotations import html from fastapi import FastAPI from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse from timestore import TimeStore from ui_kit import page __all__ = ["create_web_app"] def _badge(status: str) -> str: safe = html.escape(status) return f'{safe}' def _actions_cell(entry_id: int, status: str) -> str: if status == "draft": return ( '' f'

No entries yet.

TimeStore(store_path) @app.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse) def list_entries() -> HTMLResponse: entries = store.list_entries() body = _entries_body(entries) return HTMLResponse(page("Timesheet", body)) return app "}, {"path": "tests/test_app.py", "action": "write", "root": "module", "contents": """"Unit tests for the timesheet web app.""" from fastapi.testclient import TestClient from timesheet_web import create_web_app def test_root_returns_200_and_empty_state(tmp_path): app = create_web_app(tmp_path / "store.json") client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") assert response.status_code == 200 assert "ts-empty" in response.text assert 'data-testid="add-form"' in response.text "}, {"path": "FR1/test_fr1.py", "action": "write", "root": "conformance", "contents": """"Conformance tests for FR1: entries page and style lock.""" import html import re from fastapi.testclient import TestClient from timesheet_web import create_web_app from timestore import TimeStore from ui_kit import tokens_css def _make_client(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" app = create_web_app(store_path) return TestClient(app), store_path def test_entries_page_lists_rows_badge_and_total(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" store = TimeStore(store_path) store.add_entry("Apollo", "2026-07-06", 2.5) store.add_entry("Apollo", "2026-07-07", 6.0) app = create_web_app(store_path) client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") assert response.status_code == 200 body = response.text assert body.count('data-testid="entry-row"') == 2 assert "ts-badge--draft" in body total_match = re.search(r'class="ts-total"[^>]*>([^<]*)<', body) assert total_match is not None assert "8.5" in total_match.group(1) def test_empty_store_shows_empty_state(tmp_path): client, _ = _make_client(tmp_path) response = client.get("/") assert response.status_code == 200 body = response.text assert "ts-empty" in body assert 'data-testid="add-form"' in body assert 'data-testid="entry-row"' not in body assert "ts-total" not in body def test_project_value_is_escaped(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" store = TimeStore(store_path) store.add_entry("Ops", "2026-07-06", 1.0) app = create_web_app(store_path) client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") body = response.text assert html.escape("Ops") in body assert "Ops" not in body def test_style_lock(tmp_path): client, _ = _make_client(tmp_path) response = client.get("/") body = response.text css = tokens_css() assert body.count(css) == 1 assert 'style="' not in body assert body.count("
